test_cases.description: Standard 30-day scan — should find expiring passports
test_cases.pass_criteria: Returns at least 1 expiring document within 30-day window

test_cases.description: Already expired documents — should appear with negative days_until_expiry
test_cases.pass_criteria: already_expired count is at least 1 — expired docs surfaced separately

test_cases.description: Filter by doc type — only passports
Filter by jurisdiction — only BVI entities
No expiring documents — should return empty list
test_cases.pass_criteria: Returns empty list — no false positives

test_cases.description: Documents without expiry date — should be excluded from results
test_cases.pass_criteria: No document with null expiry_date appears in results

test_cases.description: Sort order — most urgent (lowest days_until_expiry) first
test_cases.pass_criteria: Results are sorted by days_until_expiry ascending

test_cases.description: Assigned officer must be populated for each result
test_cases.pass_criteria: Every result has a non-null assigned_officer field
